prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find Go source files in the Loki and Mimir repositories that register HTTP handlers or routes without applying authentication middleware such as `middleware.AuthenticateUser`.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find Go source files in the Loki and Mimir repositories that register HTTP handlers or routes without applying authentication middleware such as `middleware.AuthenticateUser`.
